name: Luck of the Irish Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the hash, bread crumbs and 1 egg. Mix until well blended.
3. Spread the mixture in a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Toss the cheese with flour, then sprinkle on top of the hash mixture.
5. Combine the remaining 3 eggs, milk and red pepper. Pour into the hash-lined plate.
6. Bake for 40 minutes or until the egg mixture is set.
7. Garnish with green pepper rings.
